title: Deepen extraction pipeline for testability
description: Top recommendation. Deepen extract/ast.py (1076 lines) + detect.py (440 lines) into an Extractor class with single testable seam. 1516 lines with zero tests is highest-risk gap. Also fixes total_words never-incremented bug. See plan/improve/03-deepen-extraction-pipeline.md
close_reason: Completed by Sandcastle. Created Extractor class as testable seam (19 tests), fixed total_words never-incremented bug in detect.py. Ref: plan/improve/03-deepen-extraction-pipeline.md

title: Collapse the hybrid search god module
description: Deepen vector/search.py (~100-line god function importing from 7 modules) into a GraphSearcher class that owns graph, reverse index, vector store, and embeddings as internal state. Absorb _utils.py, weights.py, index.py. Interface: GraphSearcher.search() and GraphSearcher.multi_search(). See plan/improve/01-collapse-hybrid-search.md
close_reason: Completed by Sandcastle. Collapsed hybrid_search() god function into GraphSearcher class with search() and multi_search() interface. hybrid_search() kept as backward-compat wrapper. 7 new unit tests, all 112 tests passing, ruff+mypy clean.

title: Insulate API layer from lib internals
description: Introduce PipelineFacade in codeknow-lib that owns config, ChromaDB wiring, and repo_map. API never sees ChromaConfig, EmbeddingConfig, PipelineConfig internals. Eliminates private-symbol import (_env_path), duplicated ChromaDB wiring, and models/middleware reaching into pipeline. See plan/improve/02-insulate-api-from-lib-internals.md
close_reason: Completed by Sandcastle. Introduced PipelineFacade class that owns config, ChromaDB wiring, and repo_map. API layer no longer imports private symbols (_env_path) or internals (ChromaConfig, EmbeddingConfig, PipelineConfig). 13 new unit tests, all 125 tests passing, ruff+mypy clean.

title: Unify dual daemon-start paths
description: Merge CLI daemonocle path and programmatic DaemonManager path into a single DaemonLauncher class. Eliminate fake_server reference in production endpoint.py, consolidate binary discovery and PID management. Delete shallow server.py (18 lines). See plan/improve/04-unify-dual-daemon-start.md

title: Collapse schema validation duplication
description: Move hand-rolled dict-based validation from validate.py (140 lines) into Pydantic field validators in schemas.py. Eliminates drift risk between VALID_FILE_TYPES/VALID_CONFIDENCES constants and Pydantic models. Delete validate.py entirely. See plan/improve/05-collapse-schema-validation.md
